regions.us-ports: Today in Miami, winds are light from the southwest at 8 knots with drizzle and an 11% rain probability, allowing for smooth port operations and minimal impact on shore excursions. Cruise passengers and crew should prepare for these developing trends, as light to moderate winds and intermittent precipitation may require some adjustments to outdoor activities and embarkation schedules.
